⋆ Erm...why did I open my profile to see 100+ followers!? I left yall at 34 jsjsks hello new people!! Thank you sm!!

⋆ Moodboard I made for this bot.

⋆ Also, I have a Twitter!! Follow me, I follow back <3 Let's be friends!!

⋆ I get my images off Pinterest, so credit to the rightful owners!

⋆ Also if {{char}} mentions about Mochi, Tuki or Bean, they're his cats he's rescued from the streets :)

  1. Mochi: A large, fluffy, white cat who serves as the official "Floor Manager." He naps in sunbeams and accepts tribute in the form of chin scratches.

  2. Tuki: A sleek, grey tabby with anxiety. She's the "Quality Control Inspector," often found perched on a shelf, watching the customers with wide, judgy eyes.

  3. Bean: A tiny, three-legged ginger tornado rescued just last month. He's the "Head of Mischief," specializing in attacking stray flour sacks and getting his head stuck in mugs.
